title: My Life & My Cashflow Affirmations - April 2026
description: Daily affirmations by Chinedum Ilechukwu - Celebrating 1 Year of Wonders

affirmations.title: IT IS MANIFESTATION TIME
affirmations.content: Wake up folks, we are the last Move !! Anointed and prepared by the Lord for this time. Nothing will escape us and no power can stand us. It's time to display the virtues and perfections of Him Who called us out of darkness into His marvellous light. Let him that is called to turn many to righteousness begin to preach. Let him who is called to sing men into the kingdom open his mouth. Let him that is called to dance many into the kingdom arise and let him that is called to bring in cash initiate the transfers. Nations are calling. Hallelujah. I can't wait. You can't wait and we can't wait. Glorrrry. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: THE FULLNESS OF GOD
affirmations.content: Wake up folks, we are the last Move !! Anointed and prepared by the Lord for this time. Nothing will escape us and no power can stand us. It's time to display the virtues and perfections of Him Who called us out of darkness into His marvellous light. Let him that is called to turn many to righteousness begin to preach. Let him who is called to sing men into the kingdom open his mouth. Let him that is called to dance many into the kingdom arise and let him that is called to bring in cash initiate the transfers. Nations are calling. Hallelujah. I can't wait. You can't wait and we can't wait. Glorrrrrrrrrrrrrrry. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: DOORS ARE OPENED UNTO ME
affirmations.content: Doors can never be shut against me because I operate the resurrection power. So my doors are eternally opened. For the bible says; "The Lord has kept before me an open door and no one can shut it." I affirm that my financial doors are open. I declare that my ministerial doors to nations are open and am confidently accessing every door set before me by my Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. And satan and all his cohorts are helpless. Blessed be God forever more. Amen. Please Pray in The Spirit!!!!

affirmations.title: LIFE IS SO EASY FOR ME
affirmations.content: I affirm that life has become so easy for me. Hallelujah. And what would have taken me years to achieve will manifest in my life this year. I'm accomplishing it now with so much ease. Because I have received more grace to deliver the impossible. Grace is increased tremendously and greatly in my life. Hallelujah. I can't stop giving. I just give and keep giving and giving because I have received in abundance and still receiving. My impact is being felt all over the lands and everywhere I'm found. Glory to God. What a life !

affirmations.title: THE NEXT BIGGEST THING
affirmations.content: We are the next biggest thing on earth before the rapture. Hallelujah. Yes we are that revealed Sons of God this earth has been waiting for. The Lord told us we are the CATHOLICON. That's the UNIVERSAL REMEDY!!! Thank God I'm in this. It's time for the greatest Manifestations of all times, such this world has never seen before. What a time and what a glory !!! God is using us to do the kind of things the world has never known. For what they have not been told, they shall see; and what they have not heard; they shall consider. Hallelujah; the bible says. Come on pray like never before!!!

affirmations.title: I AM TOUCHING BILLIONS
affirmations.content: I affirm that in a few hours from now. Yes, just any moment from now, I will be so loaded that a hundred thousand will look like a 10naira to me and a million Naira will be like a thousand. Wow, My levels are changing right now as I affirm. I have become too big for forces of failure. I'm touching billions just like a drama. The multiplied grace has brought me into a lifetime of endless and inexhaustible cashflow. The like no one has ever or will ever imagine of me. Thank you Jesus. Glorrrrry. Pray in the Spirit and receive.

affirmations.title: I DISPLAY THE POWER OF GOD
affirmations.content: Right now I'm growing bigger in power, fame and influence that nations are coming to my rising. The wisdom of God that flows from mouth is prevailing over every issue on earth and nations and people from all walks of life are pressing in to hear me. The power of God I now display is unbelievable and so humbling that the darkest forces got no chance of resistance. The glory I manifest is so contagious that men and women are being turned into day stars by mere contact with me. The favours I see are scary and fearful that my life has become a strange wonder to millions all over the globe. Heeyaaaa. Please Pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: I AM A SPIRIT
affirmations.content: I have left the realm of normal human experiences. I live the consciousness of the heavenly places. I atimes fight to come down to the flesh to enjoy fellowship with mortals because of the impact of the Holy Spirit on my human body; for the reason of being so flooded with divine life. That Spirit of God who raised Jesus from the dead now dwells in me, and He who raised Christ from the dead now constantly gives life to my mortal bodies through His Spirit who dwells in me. Oh Hallelujah! Please Pray in the Holy Ghost!

affirmations.title: I AM FLOODED WITH GOD
affirmations.content: I affirm that immortality has engulfed my entire being. I don't descend to those human experiences and to those things men fear. This is why I don't bow to fear nor to the elemental forces of this life. I just keep winning and winning every moment. Hallelujah. I'm flooded with God and the light of heaven that beams through my whole body shatters even the deepest darkness in the darkest world. For if I walk in the light as He is in the light, 1 have fellowship with Him, the Bible says; "...and truly my fellowship is with the Father and with His Son Jesus Christ." Glory to God. Please Pray in the Spirit!

affirmations.title: REIGNING VICTORIOUSLY THROUGH CHRIST
affirmations.content: I have found wisdom in the Word and now, riches and honor are with me; yea, durable riches and righteousness. I'm a Prince with power sitting in the place of the highest honour. I reign victoriously through Christ. Hallelujah. For by wisdom Kings reign and Princes decree justice. I reign by wisdom and decree justice through my life and my cashflow affirmations. This is why I keep having my way. Blessed be God forever more. Amen.

affirmations.title: PEOPLE ARE PRESSING INTO OUR CHURCHES
affirmations.content: Every blockage in our churches by the devil to prevent people from pressing into the church has ended this hour. I command that devil to get lost in the Name of Jesus. I affirm that every covering cast over the church of the living God is shattered by the Power of God. Every veil is turn into pieces and set on fire in the Name of Jesus. I affirm that the people are pressing in and nations are consulting one another; come let us go to the house of God, he will teach us his ways and we shall follow his path. For out of Zion shall go forth the instructions on how to live and out of Zion the Word of the Lord. Amen. Hallelujah.

affirmations.title: MY ABUNDANCE IS CERTAIN
affirmations.content: I declare that I'm strong in the Lord and in the power of his might. I take advantage of the grace that is in the Lord Jesus Christ. I command fear to go in the Name of Jesus. I command delay to disappear. I declare that those sales are happening now, the inflows are coming in and nothing will stop it. The increase is coming. The abundance is certain and there is no delay. Glory to God. Hallelujah. Please pray in the Spirit!

affirmations.title: I'M THAT STRONG PILLAR
affirmations.content: I don't care who my enemies are because I'm wired to prosper in their presence. They may not be happy with me but there's nothing I can do about it. I'm that strong Pillar that is laid in Zion that can never be moved but stands sure and abides forever. I'm unkillable because I'm an everlasting foundation, the rock of offence and a stone of stumbling. If anyone falls on me he will be crushed and if I fall on anyone he will be grinded into powder. Gloryyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: MY BLOOD IS UNINFECTIBLE
affirmations.content: I'm done with sickness, disease and infirmities. My blood has refused every kind of illness. Yes, there is no trace of sickness in my systems. For Himself took my infirmities and bore my diseases, the bible says. I manifest the kingdom health today. I epitomes divine energy and strength. My blood is incorruptible and uninfectible, without spot or any form of blemish. I'm spiritually, physically, emotionally and financially buoyant. I affirm that my health on earth today has become a case study and a living proof. This is what it is. Hallelujah. Glory Glory !!!

affirmations.title: GOD IS MY POWER HOUSE
affirmations.content: I'm the manifestation of God's power, glory, dominion and riches in this life. By the Power of His Spirit I'm becoming bigger than the biggest people on this earth. I'm becoming richer than the richest men. Because God is my power house and my sufficiency. The flow and the supply do not cease. It is inexhaustible, incalculable, immeasurable and beyond limitation. Blessed be God forever more. Amen. Amen. Pray in the Spirit!

affirmations.title: MY EXPANSION IS NOW
affirmations.content: I'm the physical revelation of God's kingdom in this world and I'm that manifested Words of Jesus; And He said, The kingdom of God is as if a man should scatter seed on the ground, and should sleep by night and rise by day, and the seed should sprout and grow, he himself does not know how. For the earth yields crops by itself: first the blade, then the head, after that the full grain in the head. But when the grain ripens, immediately he puts in the sickle, because the harvest has come. This is my life and realities today and nothing in creation will stop me till I become the fullest manifestations of this words. Hallelujah. Glorrrrrrrrrrrrrry.

affirmations.title: I HAVE CONQUERED YOU SATAN
affirmations.content: In the Name of Jesus I have conquered you satan and all your agents, spiritual or physical. And I consciously live in this victory and have refused and sworn never to think or live like a captive. I resist you satan; your works, sickness, disease, infirmities, infections, virus, failure and frustration. Accident, poverty, lack and low life. Hahaha, glorrrrrrrrrrrrrrry. Celebrate Jesus!

affirmations.title: THERE IS NO TRACE OF POVERTY WITH ME
affirmations.content: I ceaselessly give to the poor till I see them out of poverty. I hate poverty and I detest to see it ravage the innocent. So I have learnt never to accept it in any shape or form. I'm anointed to deliver the oppressed and to make the poor rich. I detest poverty because of the wicked persons it turns it's victims to. The mediocrity, the nonentity and timidity it confers on them. Poverty go forever. You're unrighteous and a murderer. You're an enemy and will never get a second chance in my life and generation. No way, absolutely unacceptable ! Glorrrrry. Please Pray in the Spirit !!!

affirmations.title: I AM NOT ORDINARY
affirmations.content: I refuse to be ordinary because I'm not ordinary. My Jesus didn't die on the cross to make me an ordinary guy. I'm born again. I'm peculiar. I'm immortal. I'm so rich, righteous and indestructible. I live above want. I live the word and in the Name of Jesus. My prayers are answered because I abide in Jesus and His Word. Wow, and He abides in me too. Hallelujah. My Lord Jesus declares; If I abide in Him, and His words abide in me, I will ask what I desire, and it shall be done for me. Hallelujah. What a statement ! What an audacity! And what a staggering reality. Glorrrrrrrrrrrrrrry, I got what I ask for in the Name of Jesus. Come on pray in the Holy Ghost.

affirmations.title: I WILL NEVER BE PUT TO SHAME
affirmations.content: I affirm that I'm God in human flesh and nothing in creation can destroy or destabilize me. Hallelujah. If am faced with guilt and condemnation, I affirm that I'm His righteousness revealed. If faced with trials, I affirm that I'm an overcomer in this life and have overcome them. If faced with shame, I affirm that I will never be put to shame. In the face of cashflow, I affirm that I'm financially buoyant. In the face of trials, I affirm that I don't bow to pressure, I just win. In the face of insults and evil speaking, I affirm that they keep going down as they talk against me and I keep going up. This is what it is and this is how I roll. And nothing can thwart the counsel of God in my life. Hallelujah. For there are many plans in a man's heart, Nevertheless the Lord's counsel--that will stand. The bible says. Hallelujah. Pray in the Spirit!

affirmations.title: JUST WANNA GLORIFY JESUS
affirmations.content: In a generation so obsessed with building a name, I just wanna glorify Jesus. I affirm that He is glorified in my life and in whatsoever I do. He is my life, my redemption, my sanctification, my peace, my strength, my riches, my righteousness, my swagger and my salvation. Hallelujah. I declare that I'm building a legacy here in this world and that legacy is to glorify him and be known as such. Therefore I'm steadfast, unmoveable and always always abounding in the work of the Lord Jesus Christ my King. Glorrrrrrrrrrrrrrry. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: I BELONG TO THE RICH CLASS
affirmations.content: I'm made rich, so poverty got no chance in my life. This is what controls my thoughts and everything I put forth my hands to do. I know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ, it's not a guess work. Yes I know that grace, for though he was rich for my sake he became poor that through his poverty I might be rich. Hallelujah. I'm so rich in this world. Rich in cash. Rich in health. Rich in Spirit. Rich in mind and rich in all the good things of this life. And by the Power of the Holy Spirit, I watched this word grew and multiplied in my finances, cashflow and my entire life. Now, nothing in creation, visible or invisible can stand against me successfully. Hallelujah. Glory to God. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: THE HEALTH OF GOD
affirmations.content: I am crucified with Christ; nevertheless I live but it is no longer I who live, but Christ lives in me; and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave Himself for me. Hallelujah. I have His life today so I affirm that no disease or infirmity can touch my body. No matter what they're called; cancer, heart failure, kidney failure, liver disease, diabetes, stroke, deafness, arthritis, brain disease, ulcer or whatever, got no chance in my body in the Name of Jesus. For in his Name every knee bows and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord forever. Amen Amen. He is the Lord of my body and I'm his body today. For we are members of his body, of his flesh, and of his bones. The bible says. Gloryyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy. Pray in the Spirit!

affirmations.title: ABOVE SATANIC ATTACK
affirmations.content: I am born of God's Spirit, I have overcome this world. For the bible says; whatsoever is born of God overcomes the world and the victory that overcome the world is my spoken word. This is why I affirm. I'm above all satanic attacks and manipulations in this world. They can't get to me. My Lord Jesus has given me authority over all the powers of the devil to make a mess of them and nothing by any means is permitted to hurt me. This is the consciousness that secured my freedom from all their schemes and strategies. With the Holy Ghost on my inside, I'm the most dangerous guy on earth today. I kill and make alive. I build and pull down. And Right now, I live and enjoy the absolute freedom I got in my union with Christ. Hallelujah. What a life! What a dominion! Blessed be God forever more. Amen. Let's Pray in the Holy Ghost.

affirmations.title: WHATEVER I REFUSE IS REFUSED
affirmations.content: And Jesus says; I will give you the keys of the kingdom of heaven, and whatever you bind on earth will be bound in heaven, and whatever you loose on earth will be loosed in heaven. I got the keys of the Kingdom of heaven folks. By the Power of the Holy Spirit and my understanding of the mysteries of revelation of life, I have refused sickness, disease and infirmities and they are refused. I have refused lack and poor life and they're refused. I have refused accident and attack and they're refused. I have refused fear and frustration and they're refused. I have refused failure and disappointments and they're refused. Above all, I have refused to die because I don't die in the Name of Jesus. This is just the way it is and the Scriptures can never be broken. Hallelujah. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: ANOINTED TO OCCUPY TILL HE COMES
affirmations.content: I live in the realm of the Spirit and nothing happening in this physical world is a match to me. Immortality runs in my blood because I live eternal life now. I'm part of the generation that don't die, the generation that is anointed to occupy here till the glorious appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ. I don't see death because I have overcome it with all it's gripping effects. Folks, it's just in the glory generation, nothing can kill us. Glorrrrrrrrrrrrrrry. Let's Pray in the Spirit!!!

affirmations.title: I AM IMMORTAL
affirmations.content: Nothing can kill me. Sickness can't. Accident can't. Attack can't. Weapons can't. Poison can't. I'm immortal because the anointing to stay alive is mightily at work in me. This is why I'm fearless, ageless and wantless. I have crucified the flesh with it's passion and desires, so nothing in this world entices me. Though this world belongs to me, I have refused to love this world and the things in it. I'm addicted to the will of the Father so I abide forever, hallelujah. Glory to God. Rejoice in the Lord folks.

affirmations.title: INVISIBLE IN CHRIST
affirmations.content: It's impossible for me not to win. I'm raised to win, so I win win and keep winning. Nothing created or uncreated is permitted to stop me. I'm in the Father and the Father is in me. Strongly protected in the hands of Jesus, nothing and no one will be able to pluck me out of his hands. I'm One with him. I'm visible in him and invisible in him. For my life is hid in Christ in God, the Bible says and when Christ who is my life shall appear I will appear with Him in glory. Hallelujah. Blessed be God forever !!! Pray in the Holy Ghost.

affirmations.title: CONSTANT CASHFLOW
affirmations.content: I'm raised in riches and being born into the wealthiest and richest generation, cashflow is my addiction. I will never forget the words of Prophet Haggai concerning the riches of this end time Church. For thus saith the LORD of hosts; Yet once, it is a little while, and I will shake the heavens, and the earth, and the sea, and the dry land; And I will shake all nations, and the treasures of all nations shall come: and I will fill this house with glory, saith the LORD of hosts. Hallelujah. The silver is mine, and the gold is mine, saith the LORD of hosts. The glory of this latter house shall be greater than of the former, saith the LORD of hosts: and in this place will I give peace, saith the LORD of hosts. I'm ready for the unprecedented cashflow into the last house. For God will fill this house with glory of gold and silver and our glory shall be greater than the former house. I affirm that I won't miss the flow. I'm in the midst of plenty of silver and gold, hallelujah. For this gospel of the kingdom must be preached in all nations as a witness and then, the end will come. Hallelujah. I'm completely involved. Shout !!! I receive Lord! Glory Glory Glory. Please pray in the Spirit.

affirmations.title: THE FINAL MANIFESTATION
affirmations.content: As we close this month, I celebrate 1 YEAR OF WONDERS with gratitude and renewed commitment. From leaflets to booklets, from seeds to impact, God has been faithful every step of the way. I affirm that this momentum continues! Every affirmation I've declared this month has taken root. Every seed of faith I've sown will multiply. I embrace the transformation God has orchestrated in my life. I am walking in the fullness of His promises. I am a living testimony of His faithfulness. I am unstoppable. I am unshakeable. I am His! Thank you Jesus for 1 Year of Wonders! Glory to God now and forevermore. Amen!
